description: Local-first runtime smoke configuration that extends the M-4 XCUITest harness toward future phase-transition gates.

policy.full_enforcement_blocker: A staging-grade runtime environment is not yet available.

notes: Firebase runtime verification still depends on a local GoogleService-Info.plist.
Signed-in Supabase verification now expects the untracked Config/Local/Staging.xcconfig overlay to supply real staging credentials.

authenticated_home.description: Authenticated review-mode launch that confirms the Home tab renders.

sign_in_surface.description: Sign-in surface smoke test with auto-login disabled.
